analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces EU priorities for cooperation with the Council of Europe on Rule of Law, focusing on fighting corruption and protecting whistle-blowers, links this to the new EU Rule of Law mechanism, and invites participation in an online event. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not explicitly showcasing historic successes or overcoming past challenges; no. EU2 (united) – no mention of EU unity or solidarity among member states; no. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – yes: it presents concrete EU action (rule of law mechanism, anti-corruption, whistle-blower protection) that addresses citizens’ concerns and implies practical benefits within the EU. EU4 (avant-garde) – partially suggestive, but the tweet doesn’t frame the EU as pioneering or leading globally; no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – focuses on internal EU rule of law rather than global human rights leadership; no. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – emphasis is internal cooperation and mechanisms, not global impact; no. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
